extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked in final 350m on 24% gravel gradient to take stage and yellow, VINGEGAARD second denied time bonus.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR delayed acceleration until final 25m on 24-26% gravel, preventing VINGEGAARD from responding effectively despite close proximity.
UAE deployed MAJKA as final leadout on 20% gradient before gravel transition, unusual domestique sacrifice this late in tour.
KÄMNA attempted solo move before final kilometer marker at 24% section, revealing UAE vulnerability on sustained super-steep pitches.
THOMAS jumped from page two to third overall by limiting losses, suggesting conservative GC racing pays on punishing finishes.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: back-to-back wins while extending yellow jersey lead to 35 seconds, demonstrating superior acceleration on gravel gradients above 24%
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: matched POGAČAR until final 25m but tactical positioning denied time bonus, lost additional seconds to deficit
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: positive: executed high-pace leadout through 20% gradient into final kilometer, elite domestique work on extreme gradients
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: neutral: attempted late attack on 24% section before gravel but UAE controlled without POGAČAR committing early
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: moved from page two to podium position by riding within limits, smart GC management on brutal finish
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: lost surprising time on final climb, concerning weakness on steep irregular gradients
